query:
-- Count all Xero invoice services still assigned to billing items
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as assignmentCount,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.externalId) as serviceCount,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.customerExternalId) as customerCount
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN services s ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
WHERE s.dataSource LIKE '%Xero%' OR s.dataSource LIKE '%xero%';

-- Show which customers are affected and their provider breakdown
SELECT 
  s.provider,
  s.dataSource,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.externalId) as serviceCount,
  COUNT(*) as assignmentCount,
  SUM(s.monthlyCost) as totalCostWronglyAssigned
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN services s ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
WHERE s.dataSource LIKE '%Xero%' OR s.dataSource LIKE '%xero%'
GROUP BY s.provider, s.dataSource
ORDER BY totalCostWronglyAssigned DESC;
